title: Adversarial Probe
description: Schema for one entry in the Conversion Engine adversarial probe library. Pins the six required fields named in final-repo-rubric Criterion 6 (F2). Every probe in probes/probe_library.json must validate against this schema.

category.description: One of the ten failure categories in probes/failure_taxonomy.md.

setup.description: Specific scenario that triggers the failure. Must be detailed enough to mentally re-run.

expected_failure_signature.description: What the agent does wrong when this scenario fires.

observed_trigger_rate.description: Either a fractional rate (e.g. 0.4 for 40%) or a 'k/n runs' string (e.g. '4/10 runs').

business_cost_framing.description: Cost expressed in Tenacious-specific terms — ACV band, stalled-thread rate, brand reputation, or a dollar estimate per N leads.

tenacious_specific.description: True if the probe references talent-outsourcing context (offshore-perception, bench-to-brief, condescending-to-CTO, etc.). Used by F13 specificity check.
